memoryArtifacts.headline: Richard Neville
memoryArtifacts.description:
Richard Neville, 2nd Baron Latimer

Richard Neville, 2nd Baron Latimer (c.1468 – c. 28 December 1530) of Snape, North Yorkshire, was an English soldier and peer. He fought at the battles of Stoke and …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Neville於大約1468年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾拉梅時，他的父親Sir Henry Neville32歲，母親Lady Joan Bourchier29歲。他於大約1490年與Lady Anne Stafford結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1530年12月28日在英國越可爾石內卜享年63歲，埋葬在英國越可爾維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Neville was born about 1468, in Latimer, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Sir Henry Neville, was 32 and his mother, Lady Joan Bourchier, was 29. He married Lady Anne Stafford about 1490. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 28 December 1530, in Snape, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Well, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Neville est né environ 1468, à Latimer, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Neville, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Bourchier, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Stafford environ 1490. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 28 décembre 1530, à Snape, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Well, Everwyck, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Nevilleが約1468年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラティマーで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Nevilleは32歳，母Lady Joan Bourchierは29歳であった。約1490年にLady Anne Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1530年12月28日にイギリスヨークシュアイアスナペで63歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Neville(이)가 대략 1468년 영국 벅잉함실르 레이팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Neville(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Bourchier(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1490년 Lady Anne Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1530년 12월 28일 영국 요르크실르 스나프에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 웰에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Neville родился около 1468 г. в местности латимир, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Neville было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Bourchier, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Stafford около 1490 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер 28 декабря 1530 г. в местности снап, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности велл, еркшир, Англия.
